creator: blacktravelpin
caption:
House of Hype Dubai – one of the top immersive experiences in the city ✨

Creative rooms, neon spaces and interactive art perfect for Reels and photos 📸

📍 Dubai Mall
🎟️ Tickets via @househype 

Tips if you go:
- Plan at least 2-3 hours, it’s huge!
- Weekdays = 20% off
- Wear comfy shoes, you’ll actually move a lot
- Go early or late if you want good photos
